topology_neutrality_n1.short_definition: Percentage of steps where absolute net charge <= 1

strict_neutrality.short_definition: Percentage of steps where absolute net charge == 0

mean_vortices.short_definition: Mean number of topological vortices over the run

low_mass_qp_count.short_definition: Number of quasi-particles classified as low mass

max_lifespan_steps.short_definition: Maximum lifespan of any tracked quasi-particle
